name: Run Hello World Job and Validate UI and CLI Results
description:
- Login with valid credentials.
- Create new organization via **UI** during onboarding.
- Create new project via **CLI**.
- Run `Hello World` Job via **CLI**.

Verify that:

- Job executed successfully in **CLI**.
- Job is displayed in successful jobs via **UI**.
descriptionHtml:
• Login with valid credentials.
  • Create new organization via UI during onboarding.
  • Create new project via CLI.
  • Run Hello World Job via CLI.

Verify that:

  • Job executed successfully in CLI.
  • Job is displayed in successful jobs via UI.

- Create new organization via **UI** during onboarding.
- Create new project via **CLI**.

- Job is displayed in successful jobs via **UI**.

items.statusDetails:
AssertionError: [AssertionError] during step: Run Hello World job via CLI
Message: [RuntimeError] during step: Verify CLI login output
Message: ERROR: Illegal argument(s) (Unexpected exception ProgrammingError: (sqlalchemy.dialects.postgresql.asyncpg.ProgrammingError) <class 'asyncpg.exceptions.InsufficientPrivilegeError'>: permission denied for table jobs
[SQL: INSERT INTO jobs (id, owner, name, cluster_name, org_name, project_name, org_project_hash, tags, status, created_at, finished_at, payload, namespace) VALUES (%s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s)]
[parameters: ('job-a0f7c501-3366-442c-a6ee-f8f859963815', 'regression-zokdt77o7j', 'regression-job-0hhncbgfej', 'default', 'regression-org-hovxvqpfkl2w', 'regression-proj-7j3c4onivj', b'iv\x06\xe2q', 'null', JobStatus.PENDING, datetime.datetime(2026, 1, 8, 3, 50, 28, 755063, tzinfo=datetime.timezone.utc), None, '{"namespace": "platform--regression-or--regression-p--6379b25b11f77b799d1ecc0d", "request": {"job_id": "job-a0f7c501-3366-442c-a6ee-f8f859963815", "c ... (499 characters truncated) ... false, "pass_config": false, "privileged": false, "restart_policy": "never", "priority": 0, "max_run_time_minutes": 1440, "preset_name": "cpu-micro"}', 'platform--regression-or--regression-p--6379b25b11f77b799d1ecc0d')]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/14/f405). Path with query: /api/v1/jobs?from_preset.)
